return(function(o,d,e,c,W,x,J,S,a,K,w,v,m,r,F,l,b,I,z,V,O,s)v,z,O,S,w,b,r,s,a,K,l,m,F,V,I=function(o,L)local d=b(L)local e=function(e)return K(o,{e},L,d)end return e end,function(o,L)local d=b(L)local
